primary_instruction_file.evidence: AGENTS.md present: 67 lines, 600 tokens, project-specific. CLAUDE.md symlinked to AGENTS.md.
primary_instruction_file.why: AGENTS.md is the cross-vendor standard; agents read it first.

instruction_quality.evidence: Covers: overview, setup, build/test/lint table, structure, code style, explicit verification criteria, safe-to-run section, link to agent-execution.md. 0 boilerplate phrases.

instruction_conciseness.evidence: instruction_audit.py: 67 lines, ~600 tokens, 0 boilerplate, well within 300-line limit.

hierarchical_instructions.evidence: Single-package repo; one root AGENTS.md is adequate for current scale. No subpackage boundaries.
hierarchical_instructions.why: Scoped files deliver higher signal-to-token ratio in large/monorepos.
hierarchical_instructions.consequence: Low risk now; becomes important if repo grows into a monorepo.

cross_agent_bridge.evidence: No agents declared (portable posture). Note: CLAUDE.md->AGENTS.md symlink is the correct bridge pattern — would score 100 with --agents claude.
cross_agent_bridge.why: Bridge ensures all agents read identical guidance from one source.

repo_map_availability.evidence: repo_map.py: 23 files, 34 edges, ranked symbol list. docs/ARCHITECTURE.md provides module-level map. No committed symbol-index artifact.
repo_map_availability.why: Committed symbol maps reduce agent token cost ~70%.
repo_map_availability.consequence: Agents benefit from ARCHITECTURE.md but lack a committed queryable index.

semantic_nav_amenability.evidence: TypeScript strict:true + noUncheckedIndexedAccess:true. Serena MCP wired in .mcp.json.
semantic_nav_amenability.why: Typed code + LSP enables exact symbol lookup and reference tracking.

dependency_structure_clarity.evidence: package.json with minimal deps (chart.js only). Module boundaries documented in ARCHITECTURE.md.
dependency_structure_clarity.why: Derivable graph lets agents reason about blast radius.

readme_overview.evidence: README.md: 138 lines — purpose, quick-start, requirements, usage, config table, dev commands, agent tooling, docs links.
readme_overview.why: Root README orients agents before any deep work.

machine_readable_contracts.evidence: No OpenAPI/Protobuf/GraphQL schemas. /api/usage and /api/current-usage HTTP endpoints have no formal contract.
machine_readable_contracts.why: Machine-readable contracts give unambiguous, verifiable interface specs.
machine_readable_contracts.consequence: Agents must infer request/response shapes from code; integration drift risk.
machine_readable_contracts.fix_ref: Author OpenAPI spec for both endpoints.

file_size_sanity.evidence: file_metrics.py: 2 oversized files both Markdown planning docs (not source). Max TypeScript file: 373 LOC. oversized_ratio: 3.9%.
file_size_sanity.why: Shorter source files keep each unit in a comprehensible token window.

test_suite_present.evidence: 9 test files in test/: aggregate, ccusage, codex-logs, current-usage, format, normalize, ranges, usage-handler, usage-self. All src/ modules covered.
test_suite_present.why: Test suite is the verifiable oracle for agent changes.

test_commands_documented.evidence: bun test in AGENTS.md table, package.json, and CI. test_commands.py: has_test_command:true.

fast_feedback_loop.evidence: No documented watch mode or quick-subset in AGENTS.md. Full suite runs fast at current size (~<1s) but this is not documented.
fast_feedback_loop.why: Documented fast subsets encourage more verification cycles.
fast_feedback_loop.consequence: Minor now; becomes relevant as suite grows.
fast_feedback_loop.fix_ref: Document 'bun test --watch' and per-file filter in AGENTS.md.

feedback_quality.evidence: TypeScript strict:true + noUncheckedIndexedAccess:true. Descriptive matchers in tests. jsdoc_block_count: 3 (minimal). typed_signature_pct: 5.3% (regex heuristic, not reliable for TS).
feedback_quality.why: Strict types + descriptive assertions turn failures into actionable signals.
feedback_quality.consequence: JSDoc gap: agents must read source to understand some public API contracts.
feedback_quality.fix_ref: Add JSDoc to exported functions in src/types.ts, src/aggregate.ts, src/ranges.ts.

coverage_reasonable.evidence: No coverage config (no nyc/c8, no vitest coverage threshold). All modules have test files; coverage is meaningful but unmeasured.
coverage_reasonable.why: Coverage target makes the green-suite signal trustworthy.
coverage_reasonable.consequence: Blind spots are invisible; agents may miss gaps when editing.

ci_runs_tests_lint.evidence: .github/workflows/ci.yml: bun install --frozen-lockfile, bun run lint, bun run typecheck, bun test on push/PR.

lint_format_automated.evidence: biome.json configured with recommended rules. bun run lint/format scripts. Wired in CI.

pre_commit_hooks.evidence: .pre-commit-config.yaml: trailing-whitespace, end-of-file-fixer, check-yaml, check-added-large-files, check-merge-conflict, detect-secrets. .githooks/pre-commit for usage:self.
pre_commit_hooks.why: Pre-commit hooks shift checks left to commit time.

governance.evidence: No CODEOWNERS file. No dependabot.yml or renovate.json.
governance.why: CODEOWNERS + Dependabot provide review routing and supply-chain maintenance.
governance.consequence: PRs lack clear reviewers; chart.js/biome/typescript accumulate unchecked updates.

standard_skills.evidence: No SKILL.md files in the project repo. .superpowers/ is gitignored (local only).
standard_skills.why: Standard Skills package reusable, portable workflows across agents and sessions.
standard_skills.consequence: Recurring workflows live only in ad-hoc prompts that don't transfer.

bundled_helper_scripts.evidence: scripts/ exists with usage-self.ts (project utility). No Skills-supporting helper scripts.
bundled_helper_scripts.why: Bundled scripts keep deterministic logic out of the context window.
bundled_helper_scripts.consequence: Deterministic ops re-derived as model reasoning each session.

mcp_declaration.evidence: .mcp.json with Serena via uvx. Portability caveat: requires uv + GitHub network on first launch.
mcp_declaration.why: Committed MCP config ensures reproducible tool connectivity.
mcp_declaration.consequence: Minor: fresh environments need uv installed.
mcp_declaration.fix_ref: Consider pinning Serena version in uvx invocation.

nav_comprehension_mcp_servers.evidence: .mcp.json wires Serena. .claude/settings.local.json: enabledMcpjsonServers:[serena]. README documents integration.
nav_comprehension_mcp_servers.why: Serena provides exact symbol/reference lookup — strongest comprehension lever.

custom_commands.evidence: No agents declared. .claude/ has settings.local.json only; no commands/ subdir.
custom_commands.why: Custom commands capture repeatable per-agent workflows.

committed_isolation_config.evidence: No .devcontainer/ or other committed sandbox config.
committed_isolation_config.why: Committed isolation makes sandboxed execution reproducible for all contributors.
committed_isolation_config.consequence: Contributors run agents with inconsistent (often no) isolation.

documented_execution_policy.evidence: docs/agent-execution.md: vendor-neutral, covers LINCE/devcontainer/OS-sandbox/hosted, safe-to-run list, require-approval list, secrets section. Referenced from AGENTS.md.
documented_execution_policy.why: Documented policy is how non-detectable sandboxes earn credit.

agent_permission_policy.evidence: No agents declared. .claude/settings.local.json uses allow rules only, not deny rules.
agent_permission_policy.why: Restrictive policy constrains unprompted agent actions.

secret_hygiene.evidence: secret_hygiene.py: gitignore_coverage_pct:100%, .env.example present (values-free), committed_secret_count:0, detect-secrets in pre-commit.
secret_hygiene.why: AI-assisted repos leak secrets at 2x baseline.

supply_chain_pinning.evidence: bun.lock committed, not gitignored. CI uses --frozen-lockfile. No Dependabot/Renovate.
supply_chain_pinning.why: Committed lockfiles + automated updates prevent silent supply-chain drift.
supply_chain_pinning.consequence: Partial: lockfile strong; no automated update alerting.

injection_hygiene.evidence: README, docs/, specs/ reviewed — no instruction-like content. Instructions confined to AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md.
injection_hygiene.why: Instructions in untrusted files can hijack agents.

spec_tasks_dir.evidence: specs/ with 001-current-usage-box.md (detailed delta-scoped spec) and TEMPLATE.md.
spec_tasks_dir.why: Delta-scoped specs give agents authoritative statement of what to build.
spec_tasks_dir.consequence: Good start; 1 real spec — grow library per new feature.

acceptance_criteria.evidence: 001-current-usage-box.md defines Scope (in/out) and derivation rules precisely. No explicit 'Acceptance Criteria' or 'Definition of Done' checklist.
acceptance_criteria.why: Explicit criteria give agents a verifiable definition of done.
acceptance_criteria.consequence: 'Done' is partially subjective; reviewers cannot objectively verify completeness.
acceptance_criteria.fix_ref: Add AC section to TEMPLATE.md and 001 spec.

issue_pr_templates.why: Templates standardize context in agent-generated PRs and issues.
issue_pr_templates.consequence: PRs arrive with inconsistent context; review lacks quality checklist.

adr_decisions.evidence: docs/adr/ with 3 ADRs: 0001-wrap-ccusage-cli, 0002-bun-vanilla-chartjs, 0003-on-demand-no-cache. All follow Context/Decision/Consequences format.
adr_decisions.why: ADRs preserve the why behind design choices.

docs_comprehension_signals.evidence: ARCHITECTURE.md with data-flow diagram + module descriptions. 3 ADRs. No CHANGELOG. jsdoc_block_count:3 (minimal). Strict TS provides implicit typing.
docs_comprehension_signals.why: Architecture doc + signals help agents understand structure and history.
docs_comprehension_signals.consequence: No CHANGELOG hides recent change history; minimal JSDoc requires reading source.
docs_comprehension_signals.fix_ref: Add CHANGELOG.md; add JSDoc to public APIs.

file_metrics.note: both are planning Markdown docs, not source code

coverage_signals.note: regex heuristic; strict TS mode provides real typing

instruction_audit.note: CLAUDE.md is a symlink — duplication is the correct bridge pattern

top_improvements.description: Add standard Skills (SKILL.md) to package project-specific reusable workflows.
Add coverage config/threshold and document fast-subset command in AGENTS.md.
Add GitHub issue/PR templates and explicit acceptance criteria to spec template.
Add CODEOWNERS and Dependabot config (also fixes supply_chain_pinning).
Add committed .devcontainer/ isolation config for reproducible sandboxed execution.
